title: carduus defloratus subsp. spinulosus
intro: Carduus defloratus subsp. spinulosus, also known as the spiny-flowered thistle, is a subspecies of the Carduus defloratus plant, which is a perennial plant in the sunflower family. It is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are thought to contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may be used to treat various health conditions. However, more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of using Carduus defloratus subsp. spinulosus for medicinal purposes.
